record.field: [ '|','|','|', '&',('company_id', '=', False), ('pf_branch_id', '=', False), '&',('company_id', 'in', company_ids), ('pf_branch_id', '=', False), '&',('company_id', '=',False),('pf_branch_id', 'in', user.pf_allowed_branch_ids.ids), '&',('company_id', 'in', company_ids),('pf_branch_id', 'in', user.pf_allowed_branch_ids.ids)]
